title: Mesto Celakovice
description: celakovice.cz zoominfo.com/c/město-čelákovice/426355970 town in the Central Bohemian Region of the Czech Republic, situated on the Elbe River approximately 27 kilometers from Prague. With a population of around 12,000 residents, it serves as a local administrative and cultural hub. The official website functions as the primary municipal portal, offering citizens and visitors essential information, administrative services, news, and contact details for the local government
